content.text: The Nike x LABELHOOD Shox Z Calistra draws on the beauty and craftsmanship of black pottery to create a dazzling shoe with understated depth. At first glance, it's an invitation to see what makes this ballet flat special. Notice the moulded patent leather upper with its subtle sheen, the floral detailing on the strap, the commanding bursts of University Red in the Shox columns. Imagine the ease with which you could slip into these elegant shoes, the places you could go, looking effortlessly chic all along the way.

productContent.title: Nike Shox Z Calistra x LABELHOOD
productContent.subtitle: Women's Shoes
productContent.description:
The Nike x LABELHOOD Shox Z Calistra draws on the beauty and craftsmanship of black pottery to create a dazzling shoe with understated depth. At first glance it's an invitation to see what makes this ballet flat special. Notice the moulded patent leather upper with its subtle sheen, the floral detailing on the strap, the commanding bursts of University Red in the Shox columns. Imagine the ease with which you could slip into these elegant shoes, the places you could go, looking effortlessly chic all along the way.


Benefits

  • Nike Shox columns provide resilient cushioning.
  • Moulded synthetic leather gives you durability.

content.text: Introduced in 1982, the Air Force 1 redefined basketball footwear from the hardwood to the tarmac. It was the first basketball sneaker to house Nike Air, but its innovative nature has since taken a back seat to its status as a street icon.

productContent.title: Nike Air Force 1 '07
productContent.subtitle: Men's Shoes
productContent.description:
Comfortable, durable and timeless – it's number one for a reason. The Air Force 1 pairs its classic silhouette with genuine leather for a crisp, clean look.


Benefits

  • The genuine leather upper with a perforated toe box is breathable and comfortable.
  • Nike Air unit provides lightweight cushioning.
  • A rubber outsole with classic pivot circles delivers traction and durability.

Product Details

  • Padded collar

content.text: The NikeCraft GPS Bricolage is true to its name. Its elements derive from unexpected use. The sole? It looks like a waffle because it took a waffle iron to invent the running shoe. The Pine Green pullstraps? They’re cut down from high-performance automotive seat belts. The upper? It’s knit—with knots—not woven. It honours the knot-tying methods used by explorers to discover the world.
You can bricolage a sneaker and you can bricolage your life. Gather your resources. Reimagine their potential. Recombine what you’ve found.
"Use your imagination to become who you want to be".
This is the shoe you wear to pull it all together.
The NikeCraft General Purpose Shoe features:
—Durable knitted upper material (open enough to breathe, tight enough to ward off a few raindrops)
—3-piece moulded cup sole: Durable rubber outsole, soft gum rubber midsole and EVA foam core
—Green nylon herringbone donning straps
—Debossed "NIKE" logo in Tom Sachs' handwriting on heel
—Premium microfibre collar
Made in Vietnam

NikeCraft products are manufactured to the exact specifications of champion athletes throughout the world. The design and construction of NikeCraft products support all the activities of your life and tell your story. NikeCraft shuns innovation for its own sake, but embraces it as a necessity. Top quality products fulfil their intended purpose while remaining as hard-wearing as possible. Before recycling, there is reuse. Before reuse, there is durability.

productContent.title: NikeCraft General Purpose Shoe 'Bricolage'
productContent.subtitle: Shoes
productContent.description:
The NikeCraft GPS Bricolage is true to its name. Its elements derive from unexpected use. The sole? It looks like a waffle because it took a waffle iron to invent the running shoe. The Pine Green pullstraps? They're cut down from high-performance automotive seat belts. The upper? It's knit—with knots—not woven. It honours the knot-tying methods used by explorers to discover the world.


Product details

  • Durable knitted upper material (open enough to breathe, tight enough to ward off a few raindrops)
  • 3-piece moulded cup sole: Durable rubber outsole, soft gum rubber midsole and EVA foam core
  • Green nylon herringbone donning straps
  • Debossed 'NIKE' logo in Tom Sachs' handwriting on heel
  • Premium microfibre collar

Air Max Plus x HOMECOMING 'African Sunrise' 'Bright Mandarin and Safety Orange' (IM4960-800) Release Date

content.text: Born in Lagos, HOMECOMING brings together music, sport, fashion and community, connecting a global network shaped by African culture and its diaspora.

The release comes in two colourways. 'African Sunrise' draws from early morning light over West Africa. Bright Mandarin and Safety Orange reflect the heat and colour of the day as it begins. 'Pan African' combines black, red and green; colours tied to identity, pride and shared heritage across the continent and its diaspora.

The upper is woven in a tight mesh construction, drawn from the net sponges sold in Lagos markets. The toe is dipped in a darker finish, referencing the West African process of indigo dyeing. Each pair comes with three lace sets and six charms to personalise your look.

content.text: Remember the revolution. 1987 saw the birth of the Air Max lineage, showcasing visible Air for the first time. What began as an experiment in cushioning soon evolved into an icon on the track and the streets. Over the years, it's been reimagined and re-tooled, but the heritage always remains.

productContent.description:
Born in Lagos, HOMECOMING brings together music, sport, fashion and community, connecting a global network shaped by African culture and its diaspora. The upper is woven in a tight mesh construction, drawn from the net sponges sold in Lagos markets. The toe is dipped in a darker finish, referencing the West African process of indigo dyeing. Each pair comes with three lace sets and six charms to personalise your look.


Behind the design

The release comes in two colourways. 'African Sunrise' draws from early morning light over West Africa. Bright Mandarin and Safety Orange reflect the heat and colour of the day as it begins. 'Pan African' combines black, red and green, colours tied to identity, pride and shared heritage across the continent and its diaspora.

content.text: A rose is more than just its petals. Teyana Taylor's AJ3 honours the protective thorns that have sharpened her on her path to greatness. A premium leather upper in Fir grounds the design, and Metallic Gold details at the laces add the perfect amount of flash. Sculptural TPU vines sprout from the concrete-textured midsole, while roses blooming on the tongue and sockliner are an elegant finishing touch under the fierce exterior.

productContent.fullTitle: Air Jordan 3 x Teyana Taylor 'Concrete Rose' Women's Shoes
productContent.title: Air Jordan 3 x Teyana Taylor 'Concrete Rose'
productContent.subtitle: Women's Shoes
productContent.description:
A rose is more than just its petals. Teyana Taylor's AJ3 honours the protective thorns that have sharpened her on her path to greatness. A premium leather upper in Fir grounds the design, and Metallic Gold details at the laces add the perfect amount of flash. Sculptural TPU vines sprout from the concrete-textured midsole, while roses blooming on the tongue and sockliner are an elegant finishing touch under the fierce exterior.


Benefits

  • Flexible foam midsole gives you plenty of support.
  • Air-Sole units in the heel and forefoot provide lightweight cushioning.
  • Solid rubber outsole provides traction where you need it.

productContent.fullTitle: Jordan x Teyana Taylor Everyday Plus Cushioned Crew Socks (4 Pairs)
productContent.title: Jordan x Teyana Taylor Everyday Plus Cushioned
productContent.subtitle: Crew Socks (4 Pairs)
productContent.description:
Nothing Teyana Taylor does is regular, so obviously her socks had to follow suit. This unique design bears a thorny Swoosh and her rosy remix on the Jumpman. A sturdy heel counter and cushioning underfoot softens the impact of your stride, while sweat-wicking fabric keeps your feet cool and dry on your daily pursuit.


Benefits

  • A band around the arch feels snug and supportive.
  • Nike Dri-FIT technology moves sweat away from your skin for quicker evaporation, helping you stay dry and comfortable.

Product Details

  • Fabric: 67% cotton/30% polyester/2% elastane/1% nylon
  • Machine wash
  • Imported

content.text: Arriving during Kobe's final season, the low-cut Kobe XI distilled his signature legacy to its essence: high performance, lightweight and sophisticated. The Kobe 11 Protro keeps the same ethos, but pushes it forward ten years after the original debut.

A black mesh upper is drenched in Metallic Gold numerology references. A ReactX drop-in midsole replaces the Lunarlon foam found in the original Kobe XI, and is combined with a heel Air Zoom unit to deliver responsive cushioning. On the exterior, the outsole features a revised tread pattern for premium traction and court feel.

A ReactX drop-in midsole replaces the Lunarlon foam found in the original Kobe XI, and is combined with a heel Air Zoom unit to deliver responsive cushioning. On the exterior, the outsole features a revised tread pattern for premium traction and court feel.

productContent.fullTitle: Kobe XI EM Protro Basketball Shoes
productContent.title: Kobe XI EM Protro
productContent.subtitle: Basketball Shoes
productContent.description:
Arriving during Kobe's final season, the low-cut Kobe 11 distilled his signature legacy to its essence: high performance, lightweight and sophisticated. The Kobe 11 Protro keeps those same ethos, but pushes them forward in true Mamba fashion. Kobe's famed Flyknit upper is reinforced with TPU in targeted areas for strength while preserving minimal weight. The ReactX drop-in midsole combines with a heel Air Zoom unit, delivering flexibility and responsiveness. And the outsole features a game-breaking traction pattern, keeping with Kobe's longstanding obsession with revolutionising traction on the court.


Benefits

  • ReactX drop-in midsole offers optimal soft responsiveness
  • Heel Air Zoom unit provides bounce and stability
  • Herringbone traction pattern

productContent.fullTitle: Nike SB Dunk Low Pro Skate Shoes
productContent.title: Nike SB Dunk Low Pro
productContent.subtitle: Skate Shoes
productContent.description:
You can always count on a classic. The Dunk Low pairs its iconic colour-blocking with premium materials and plush padding for game-changing comfort that lasts. The possibilities are endless—how will you wear your Dunks?


Benefits

  • The upper softens and gains vintage character with wear.
  • The foam midsole offers lightweight, responsive cushioning.
  • The rubber outsole featuring a classic pivot circle adds durable traction and heritage style.

productContent.fullTitle: Nike Vomero Premium SP Men's Shoes
productContent.title: Nike Vomero Premium SP
productContent.subtitle: Men's shoes
productContent.description:
The Vomero Premium always features two energy-boosting Air Zoom units surrounded by ultrasoft, responsive ZoomX 3.0 foam to give you our most comfortable ride yet for everyday road runs. This elegant make takes things a step further and pairs high performance with high style. An all-black look brings sophisticated styling so you don't have to choose between the race or the runway.


Breathable upper

Engineered mesh upper is breathable, lightweight and soft.


ZoomX foam midsole

Our full-length ZoomX 3.0 midsole is made of Nike's lightest and most responsive cushioning for a comfortable ride.


Double Air Zoom

Two Air Zoom units, one at the forefoot and one at the heel, boost energy return.


Durable Traction

Our durable Waffle outsole with high-abrasion rubber provides all the traction you need.
